title: Family Island — Farming game
notes:
Hey Islanders!
We're always improving Family Island! This update includes bug fixes, performance enhancements, and a whole lot of love to make your island life even better.
Explore, adventure, and win amazing rewards!
Want to share the fun? Invite your friends to play and get FREE REWARDS! Join our community on Facebook and Instagram for more fun.
Loving Family Island? Leave a review!

title: Game of Thrones: Conquest ™
notes:
Join us to honor House Lannister!
+Celebrate House of the Dragon season 3 with bonus events every week! 
+Earn Limited time rewards - Vhagar Mother of Dragons, a Dragon Heir Pawn, and more!
+New Gear: Western Warden * Imperial Dragon Chanfron 
Read more at gotconquest.com/news

title: Merge Mansion: Puzzles & Story
notes:
Summer has arrived in Hopewell Bay, and there's plenty to look forward to in our latest update!

• Maddie and her friends are gearing up for an exciting soccer watch party.
• Discover and restore the Hallway of Curiosities, our newest area filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered.
• Enjoy a lineup of fun seasonal events and brand-new Season Passes packed with rewards.
• We've also made a variety of improvements and fixes to keep your experience running smoothly.

See you in Hopewell Bay!

title: Mortal Kombat
notes:
Update 7.2.1 addresses several bugs, including:

- MK II Movie Shao Kahn dealing incorrect damage
- Leatherface no longer assisting on ally stuns as expected
- MK11 Sub-Zero’s Passive incorrectly saving himself instead of his teammates
- Leatherface no longer assisting on ally stuns as expected

Check out the full list of bug fixes here: http://go.wbgames.com/MKMobileReleaseNotes
